text.t: Справочное поле, указано среднее количество заготовок в хлысте. Поле используется для дальнейшего расчета.

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: ПОДСВЕЧИВАТЬ ДУБЛИ (диаметр прутка и длина)

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: при установке флажка меняется способ расчета стоимости заготовки расчет ведется не от прутка, а от фактической длинны

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: марка отсеивается по введенному диаметру

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: невозможность создание одинаковых заготовок
